surface: Code-based routing at full binding parity (2026-07-06 gap-closure sweep): the full Match pipeline, router lifecycle events, the complete read-hook family, full-parity `Link` (preloading, masking, `activeProps`), `useBlocker`/`Block`, `Await`/`defer`, scroll restoration, lazy routes, not-found handling, and search-param validation/middleware — differential-verified byte-equal vs the real `@tanstack/react-router`.
divergences: Refs are props — `createLink`'s `forwardRef` becomes a `ref` prop.
No `flushSync` in the `Link` click handler; navigation state updates run synchronously.
ssr: SSR entries (`RouterServer`/`RouterClient`, `HeadContent`/`Scripts`) not yet ported; no SSR tests.
notes: Still open: file-based routing + the codegen plugin, devtools, and the typed public surface (factories/hooks are still `any`).
